task: Phase 06 — DB Settings & Delivery: trust-boundary code surfaces (env-write injection defense, save-gate ordering, info-disclosure sanitization, ADMIN gating, secret-file hygiene)

snippets.description: Injection defense (E1): sanitizeValue truncates the written value at the first CR/LF, discarding any `\nKEY=value` clobber payload — a legitimate JDBC string has no newline, so this is loss-free.
snippets.content: function sanitizeValue(value: string): string { return value.split(/[\r\n]/)[0] ?? ""; }

snippets.description: Backup-before-write (A2b): copyFileSync(.env → .env.bak) runs BEFORE writeFileSync mutates .env; only the DATABASE_URL line is replaced, all other keys preserved.
snippets.content: if (existsSync(envPath)) { copyFileSync(envPath, bakPath); } ... rewritten = lines.map(l => l.startsWith('DATABASE_URL=') ? newline : l)

snippets.description: Save-gate ordering invariant (E2): writeDatabaseUrl + process.exit are unreachable unless tryConnect() returned ok; process.exit gated behind NODE_ENV!=='test' && ORDERSTOCK_NO_EXIT!=='1'.
snippets.content: const ok = await tryConnect(url); if (!ok) return { error: CONNECT_FAIL_MESSAGE }; writeDatabaseUrl(url); if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'test' && process.env.ORDERSTOCK_NO_EXIT !== '1') process.exit(0);

snippets.description: Info-disclosure defense (E3): tryConnect logs the raw error server-side (console.error) only and returns a boolean; the caller returns a FIXED Thai CONNECT_FAIL_MESSAGE — never the URL/host/user/password.
snippets.content: catch (error) { console.error('[settings/db] test-connection failed:', error); return false; }

snippets.description: Elevation defense (E4/E8): every exported settings action calls requireAuthState('ADMIN') first; the page calls requireAuth('ADMIN'). Proven mechanically by auth-guard-coverage.test.ts.
snippets.content: const denied = await requireAuthState('ADMIN'); if (denied) return denied;

snippets.description: Edge defense-in-depth (E4): the authorized callback now ADMIN-gates /settings/** in addition to /admin/**.
Secret-file hygiene (A3): `.env*` matches both .env and .env.bak, so the backup is never committed. Regression-guarded by env-write.test.ts.
